statements.notes: Specially formulated for adults 50+

Triple-ingredient
Triple-action
Triple-benefit
Cartilage
Synovial fluid
Bone
Tendon
Glucosamine: Basic building block for maintaining joint cartilage and helps to maintain structural integrity of your joints. Beneficial for joint elasticity and flexibility. Helps promote mobility and support.
Chondroitin: A naturally occurring nutrient found in the connective tissues, which lubricates and cushions your joints.
Calcium + Vitamin D: These nutrients are essential for building and maintaining strong bones and teeth. Vitamin D has also been shown to strengthen muscle.
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
List No. 1138 P201 Cat. A130 1A072

No matter what your age, joint discomfort can make you feel older than you really are.
TripleFlex lets you live as young as you feel.
TripleFlex 50+ from Nature Made helps people over 50 maintain healthy joints with a special formula designed just for them.
TripleFlex 50+ works with your body naturally to help support joint comfort, mobility and flexibility.

TripleFlex 50+ provides the body with key nutrients that help support daily maintenance of your joints with:
Glucosamine - helps support joint comfort, mobility and flexibility
Chondroitin - helps lubricate and cushion the joints
Calcium and vitamin D - Calcium helps build and maintain strong bones and teeth; Vitamin D improves calcium absorption, helps support and maintain strong bones, and helps support healthy muscle tissue.
TripleFlex keeps you living as young as you feel.
This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Triple strength

Glucosamine
Chondroitin
Calcium + vitamin D
2 caplets per day
Dietary Supplement
Suggested use: Take two caplets daily. Caplets can be taken either before or with a meal. For easier swallowing, take with water before and during ingestion.
Keep bottle tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place, out of reach of children.
Store in a cool, dry place, out of reach of children.
Do not use if imprinted seal under cap is broken or missing.
